title: Rewrite playwright SKILL.md to use substrate's swift-playwright instead of npx playwright-cli
description:
Operator-stated 2026-05-26 during the skills migration: 'playwright: we have a swift-playwright and we need to add this to root agents.' Playwright is confirmed HM-equivalent (root-keep in substrate/skills/), but its current SKILL.md depends on `npx playwright-cli` which violates substrate's [[brew OK, npm not]] doctrine. Substrate has the Swift-native equivalent vendored at `private/universal/substrate/maintainers/m1guelpf/public/universal/tooling/swift/swift-playwright/` (git submodule). Scope: (1) read substrate's swift-playwright Package.swift + README + cli surface to understand the Swift CLI's command shape; (2) rewrite `substrate/skills/playwright/SKILL.md` to invoke swift-playwright via `swift run --package-path` per substrate convention (or via brew-installed binary if substrate offers one); (3) update the bundled wrapper script in `substrate/skills/playwright/scripts/` to use swift-playwright; (4) remove the npx-prerequisite-check section; (5) preserve the skill's high-level usage (browser automation, navigation, screenshots, etc.) — only the implementation layer changes; (6) validate by running 1-2 browser automation tasks via the rewritten skill.

## Composes with existing types (per [[cost-model-non-divergence-discipline]])

- swift-playwright (maintainers/m1guelpf vendored submodule) — Swift-native CLI replacement for playwright-cli
- (no direct cost-type composition — skill update is content authoring, not cost-tracked operation)

## Substrate-doctrine alignment

- [[brew OK, npm not]] — substrate prefers Swift/brew tooling over npm; playwright via npx violates this. swift-playwright is the substrate-aligned replacement.
- [[gstack-belongs-in-maintainers]] — swift-playwright correctly lives under maintainers/m1guelpf/ as upstream-vendored. The skill composes with it via substrate-path reference.
- [[agent-abilities-pokemon-mechanics-with-topology-2026-05-26]] — playwright as HM-equivalent (every agent doing browser work needs it) confirmed root-keep. Skill stays at substrate/skills/.
